name: Supply-Chain Audit
description: Inventory of installed binaries + their codesigning posture. Walks Mach-O headers, builds a codesigning graph (signer → binaries), and inspects recently installed DMG/PKG payloads. Tuned for engineering laptops where the npm / PyPI / Homebrew supply chain is the primary attack surface.

plugins.role: Build signer→binary graph for /Applications + ~/Applications + user-installed CLI tools
Deep Mach-O inspection: dyld bindings, suspicious load commands, missing hardened-runtime
Inspect DMG/PKG installer packages encountered in quarantine for unsigned payloads
Cross-reference plist files for suspicious entitlement or LSEnvironment patterns
